threats.title: Http Response Manipulation
threats.mitigation:
- Terapkan validasi input dan encoding output
- Gunakan Web Application Firewall (WAF).  
- Ikuti praktik pengkodean yang aman.

threats.title: Http Request Payload Manpulation
threats.mitigation:
- Terapkan validasi input dan encoding output
- Gunakan Web Application Firewall (WAF).  
- Ikuti praktik pengkodean yang aman.

threats.title: Http Request Spamming
threats.mitigation:
- terapkan rate-limiting
- gunakan reverse proxy / anti-ddos service seperti cloudflare

threats.title: Man in the middle attack
threats.description: Kredensial pengguna diketahui oleh pihak ketiga yang melakukan packet sniffing

threats.title: Http Request Spamming
threats.mitigation:
- terapkan rate-limiting
- gunakan reverse proxy / anti-ddos service seperti cloudflare
